metadata.description: AI-powered writing and research tools for Claude Code

plugins.name: fact-checker
plugins.description: Systematically verify factual claims using multi-LLM triage and source-grounded verification.

plugins.name: spec-debate
plugins.description: Multi-LLM adversarial spec debate. Refines PRDs and tech specs through iterative critique until all models reach consensus.

plugins.name: gtm-forge
plugins.description: Build, validate, and stress-test Go-To-Market strategies for enterprise managed services. Multi-LLM adversarial critique, vendor claim verification, competitive counter-pitches, and funding research.
